attributes.title: [InfluxDB OTel] Overview
attributes.description: High-level overview of InfluxDB health: instance capacity, HTTP traffic, query controller load, storage health, and Go runtime.

params.markdown:
## [InfluxDB OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides a high-level view of InfluxDB health:
- Instance capacity (buckets, orgs, uptime)
- HTTP API request rate and traffic
- Query controller load and memory headroom
- Storage health (WAL, cache, compaction)
- Go runtime (heap, goroutines)

query.esql:
TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE influxdb_uptime_seconds IS NOT NULL
| STATS uptime = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(influxdb_uptime_seconds))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE influxdb_uptime_seconds IS NOT NULL
| STATS uptime = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(influxdb_uptime_seconds))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE influxdb_buckets_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS buckets = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(influxdb_buckets_total))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE influxdb_buckets_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS buckets = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(influxdb_buckets_total))

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_api_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(http_api_requests_total)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_api_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(http_api_requests_total)

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_all_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_all_active))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_all_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_all_active))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE storage_wal_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS wal_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_wal_size))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE storage_wal_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS wal_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_wal_size))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE go_goroutines IS NOT NULL
| STATS goroutines = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_goroutines))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE go_goroutines IS NOT NULL
| STATS goroutines = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_goroutines))

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_api_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(http_api_requests_total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), response_code
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_api_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(http_api_requests_total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), response_code
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_compiling_active IS NOT NULL OR qc_queueing_active IS NOT NULL OR qc_executing_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS compiling = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_compiling_active)), queueing = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_queueing_active)), executing = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_executing_active)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_compiling_active IS NOT NULL OR qc_queueing_active IS NOT NULL OR qc_executing_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS compiling = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_compiling_active)), queueing = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_queueing_active)), executing = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_executing_active)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE storage_shard_disk_size IS NOT NULL OR storage_wal_size IS NOT NULL OR storage_tsm_files_disk_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS shard_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_shard_disk_size)), wal_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_wal_size)), tsm_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_tsm_files_disk_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE storage_shard_disk_size IS NOT NULL OR storage_wal_size IS NOT NULL OR storage_tsm_files_disk_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS shard_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_shard_disk_size)), wal_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_wal_size)), tsm_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_tsm_files_disk_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap_bytes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap_bytes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE storage_cache_inuse_bytes IS NOT NULL OR storage_cache_disk_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS inuse_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_cache_inuse_bytes)), disk_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_cache_disk_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE storage_cache_inuse_bytes IS NOT NULL OR storage_cache_disk_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS inuse_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_cache_inuse_bytes)), disk_bytes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(storage_cache_disk_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_api_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = MAX(http_api_requests_total) BY host.name
| SORT total DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_api_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = MAX(http_api_requests_total) BY host.name
| SORT total DESC
| LIMIT 10
